name: cftunnel
description: Codex guidance for operating and maintaining the Kyndlo Cloudflare Tunnel helper.

interface.shortDescription: Work with Kyndlo Cloudflare tunnel tooling from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Use Codex to inspect, configure, troubleshoot, and maintain Kyndlo's Cloudflare Tunnel helper while preserving token safety and confirming changes that affect Cloudflare resources.
defaultPrompt: Use Cftunnel to inspect my tunnel setup.
Use Cftunnel to troubleshoot a Cloudflare tunnel.
Use Cftunnel to review a tunnel config safely.
